queue_intent: T65 tranche: 15/15 gates DONE. Carry-forward proof/eval gates from T41/T52/T58/T64/X remain.

tasks.title: GATE.T41.PROOF.FH_REAUDIT.001: First-hour re-audit fh_5, produce fh_4 to fh_5 delta
tasks.intent: Re-run /audit first-hour after all T41 fixes. Compare 20-dimension scorecard, 5 goal scores, 5 moment scores, feel dashboard. Target: 0 CRITICAL, <=3 MAJOR, Goal avg >=4.0. Milestone: REGRESSION_ANCHOR. Tier 3: runs after all fix gates.
constraints: Tier 3: all T41 fix gates must be DONE.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.T52.COMBAT.VISUAL_PROOF.001: Visual proof for NPC labels
tasks.intent: Run visual sweep. Verify: NPC labels visible in npc_closeup frame, HOSTILE text on hostile NPC, health bars present. Compare vs audit_1.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.T52.ECON.STRESS_PROOF.001: Stress bot proof for economy fixes
tasks.intent: Run stress bot 1500 cycles. Verify: trade diversity >=8/12 goods, credit direction changes >=3, tariff revenue >0.
constraints: Tier 3 -- runs after all economy fixes.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.T52.EVAL.AUDIT_DELTA.001: Re-run audit + before/after delta
tasks.intent: Re-run full audit, compare vs audit_1 baseline. Produce delta table for all dimensions.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.T58.PROOF.FO_MANAGER_E2E.001: FO Manager E2E headless proof
tasks.intent: Headless Godot proof: dock, verify recap displayed, check empire health diamond, view consolidated 5-tab dashboard, FO decision flow, service record visible. Milestone: PLAYABLE_BEAT.
constraints: Requires all T58 FO bridge + UI gates done.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.T64.PROOF.AUDIT_DELTA.001: Re-audit first-hour, audit_13->audit_14 delta
tasks.intent: Re-run /audit first-hour (audit_14) after all T64 fixes. Compare vs audit_13: 20 dimensions, 5 goals, 5 moments, emotional arc, feel dashboard. Target: 0 CRITICAL, <=3 MAJOR, Goal avg >=4.0, EA readiness CONDITIONAL->READY. Milestone: REGRESSION_ANCHOR.
constraints: Tier 3: all T64 fix gates must be DONE.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.X.EVAL.BATTLE_STATIONS.001: Post-implementation spin eval
tasks.intent: Evaluate battle stations: run deep systems bot, verify spin activates before combat, hull damage occurs, transition timing correct, audio/visual present. Assess eval issues #4/#6/#8 thresholds.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.X.EVAL.FH_DEPTH_PROOF.001: Re-run fh_6 audit, fh_5 vs fh_6 delta
tasks.intent: Re-run /audit first-hour (fh_6) after all T63 fixes. Compare vs fh_5: 20 dimensions, 5 goals, 5 moments, emotional arc, feel dashboard. Target: 0 CRITICAL, <=3 MAJOR, Juice >50%, Spatial >3/5. Milestone: REGRESSION_ANCHOR.
constraints: Tier 3: all T63 fix gates must be DONE.

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.X.EVAL.PERF_PROFILE.063: FPS profiling session
tasks.intent: Profile FPS bottleneck: run visual bot with FPS logging, identify frames below 30fps, measure per-system tick budget breakdown, propose optimization targets. EA readiness blocker (min=12fps needs >=30).

escalation_rules.note: Escalate if blocked or scope expands.

tasks.title: GATE.X.HYGIENE.EPIC_REVIEW.065: Audit epic statuses, close completed epics
tasks.intent: Audit all epic statuses vs completed gates. Close epics where all gates DONE. Identify superseded TODO gates (T41.PROOF.FH_REAUDIT, T52.EVAL.AUDIT_DELTA, X.EVAL.FH_DEPTH_PROOF). Recommend next anchor epic for T65.

tasks.title: GATE.X.HYGIENE.REPO_HEALTH.065: Full test suite + warning scan + hash stability
tasks.intent: Run full C# test suite, semgrep, optimize scan (quick mode). Verify golden hashes stable. Report warning count and dead code signals. Baseline for T64.
